title: Vae Cafe Collection
description: Required mods for the Vae Cafe server.
body:
# The Vae Cafe Mod Collection 1.20.1

A fabric based [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) modpack that includes useful tools and many quality of life mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), [Xero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), and many more...

Adds content to spice up the gameplay with a new combat system ([Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)), new weapons and items, new biomes ([Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)), and new decorative blocks.

Includes many optimization mods for fast and smooth gameplay.

> *Mid-ranged specs recommended but it is possible to have a decent frame rate on lower-end specs thanks to all the optimizations.*

**Required to join the Vae Cafe Minecrat Server.**
More information to join at our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/kRJNSF6Ya7)
